pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to align with the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing compatibility issues if Java 21-specific APIs are used in code.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate Servlet API dependency from javax to jakarta namespace and update version for Jakarta EE 10 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21 ecosystems require Jakarta EE 9+ (jakarta.* namespace). Using javax.servlet causes ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime when deployed on a Jakarta EE 10+ compatible container or Spring Boot 3 app.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate Annotation API dependency from javax to jakarta namespace and update version for Jakarta EE 10 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21 ecosystems require Jakarta EE 9+ (jakarta.* namespace). Using javax.annotation causes ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Hibernate ORM core dependency to a version compatible with Jakarta EE 10 and Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Hibernate versions (6.1.x) may not fully support Jakarta EE 10 namespaces or Java 21 features, leading to runtime errors or compilation failures against new APIs.

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/s06/Emplo.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.servlet does not exist' errors on Spring Boot 3 / Java 21.

src/main/resources/META-INF/persistence..general_idea: Update JPA persistence XML namespace and schema location from Java EE (javax) to Jakarta EE (jakarta) to align with Spring Boot 3 and Java 21 standards.
src/main/resources/META-INF/persistence..why_exists: Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ require the 'jakarta' namespace; using the old 'javax' namespace causes runtime failures or validation errors as the old API is no longer present.

src/main/resources/META-INF/persistence..general_idea: Update JPA persistence version attribute from 2.2 to 3.0 to match the new Jakarta EE schema.
src/main/resources/META-INF/persistence..why_exists: The schema version must match the namespace; mismatched versions may cause validation warnings or errors depending on the parser strictness.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Update web.xml namespace and schema location from Java EE (javax) to Jakarta EE (jakarta) to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces; using the old Java EE namespace causes deployment failures or classloading errors due to missing javax.servlet classes.
